title: trichera diversifolia
intro: Trichera diversifolia, also known as the Forest Mint or Australian Mint Bush, is a species of plant in the family Lamiaceae that is native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and relieving symptoms of colds and flu. The health benefits of Trichera diversifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe the digestive system and boost the immune system. Trichera diversifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine to make tinctures and salves.
